description: Implement unit tests for the PaymentService class in the project at ~/IdeaProjects/payment-system using JUnit 5 (v5.x) and Mockito (v5.x). Create the test class com.payment.PaymentServiceTest in src/test/java to test the processPayment method, ensuring the pom.xml is updated with the required dependencies. The tests must cover successful charges, declined charges, and network exceptions, verifying the return values and the transaction statuses (SUCCESS, DECLINED, and ERROR) saved to the TransactionRepository. Verify all interactions with the CreditCardProcessor and TransactionRepository mocks.
